guide.title: Prollio Dashboard Guide
guide.description:
This guide will walk you through everything you need to get started with the Prollio platform — from connecting your Telegram channel, setting up pricing, and managing events, to sending messages and tracking your subscribers.

Whether you're a coach, consultant, educator, or content expert, this dashboard is your central hub to monetize your knowledge and deliver exclusive value to your community.

connect_channel.title: Connect Your Telegram Channel to Prollio
connect_channel.step3: Step 3. Verify that your channel is connected

create_bot.title: Create Your Telegram Bot with BotFather

Go to your channel → Tap the channel nam: Go to your channel → Tap the channel name → Open
Tap Add Admin → Search for @ProllioBot →: Tap “Add Admin” → Search for @ProllioBot → Select it → Grant the necessary permissions → Tap “Done”
Return to the Prollio Dashboard → Go to: Return to the Prollio Dashboard → Go to the “Channels” page — if the bot was added correctly, your channel will automatically appear in the list
Send /newbot and follow the instructions: Send /newbot and follow the instructions to set a name and username for your bot. Your bot username must end with bot (e.g., MyAwesomeBot).
After creating the bot, BotFather will s: After creating the bot, BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy this token — you’ll need it to connect your bot to Prollio.

general.q1: What is Prollio and what is it for?
general.a1: Prollio is a web platform (prollio.ai) where you can create your personal Dashboard, manage your content, monetize it, post informational materials and videos, organize events, and connect a messenger app for management.
general.a2: The Dashboard is your personal page on Prollio. Initially, it is inactive and becomes active after payment.
general.q3: How do I start using Prollio?
general.a3: Submit an Application → Prollio reviews it → Upon approval, you receive an email → Create a password → After payment, the Dashboard becomes active.
general.q4: Can I stop using the services at any time?
general.a4: Yes. However, the paid amount is non-refundable.
general.q5: Who should I contact if I have questions?

application.q1: Is there a fee to submit an application?
application.a1: No. There is no fee for application review.
application.q2: What happens after I submit an application?
application.a2: Prollio reviews the submitted data and planned activity.
application.a3: Yes, additional documents or information may be requested if needed.
application.q4: When will I know if my application is approved?
application.a4: You will receive an email within 24 hours informing you of approval or rejection.
application.q5: Why could my application be rejected?
application.a5: If the planned activity does not meet platform criteria or poses legal/compliance risks.

payments.q1: How do I make payments for services?
payments.a1: Payment is made according to the chosen plan, as a one-time yearly payment, via any payment method.
payments.a2: Yes, the basic 30-day plan is free. Only the commission from sales applies.
payments.q4: Where can I see pricing plans?
payments.q5: How are event participation payments processed?
payments.a5: Participants pay via the messenger app linked to the payment terminal, owned by Prollio LLC.

commission.a1: The Commission is the fee given to Prollio from revenue generated through the Dashboard; amount depends on the chosen plan.
commission.q2: When do I receive my funds?
commission.a2: Funds are transferred twice a month, on the 1st and 15th, automatically to the bank account linked to your Dashboard.
commission.q3: What happens if I underpay or don’t pay?
commission.a3: Prollio sends a notification; payment must be made within 1 business day. Otherwise, services are suspended.
commission.q4: What if I don’t pay within 30 days?
commission.a4: The inactive Dashboard will be deleted, but you can submit a new Application.

content.a1: Content must comply with terms, laws, not contain discrimination, violence, drugs, or defamatory material.
content.q2: What happens if rules are violated?
content.a2: Prollio may suspend services without refund.
content.q3: Is Prollio responsible for issues between me and participants?
content.a3: No, Prollio is not responsible, but there is a public offer binding between you and participants.
content.q4: Can Prollio monitor my transactions or content?
content.a4: Yes, Prollio can monitor activity and take action on suspicious or illegal content.
